General.Name: Fu Shou Yuan International Group Ltd
General.Description: Fu Shou Yuan International Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides burial and funeral services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Burial Services, Funeral Services, and Other Services segments. The Burial Services segment sells burial plots; and offers cemetery maintenance services. The Funeral services segment engages in the planning of funeral arrangement; and interment, organizing, and hosting of the funeral. The Other Services segment produces and sells cremation machines and related maintenance services; and provides landscape and garden design, and construction services. The company offers flowers and related designing services; and manufactures and sells cremation devices, as well as after-sales service for cremation devices. It also sells agricultural products; and provides education services. The company operates cemeteries and funeral facilities. Fu Shou Yuan International Group Limited was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.

4.Name: Mr. Ching Kit  Cheng A.C.I.S., A.C.S.
